metadata.description: Short environment identifier used in all resource names (e.g. dev, staging, prod)
Azure region for all resources
App Service Plan SKU name (default P1v3 = Premium v3 1 core)
Entra External ID (CIAM) tenant ID
App registration client ID — woodgrove-groceries web app
App registration client ID — woodgrove-groceries-api
App registration client ID — graph-middleware
App registration client ID — auth-api (custom authentication extension)
Primary public domain for the web app (e.g. woodgrovedemo.com)
Entra authority URL — e.g. https://<tenant>.ciamlogin.com/<tenantId>/v2.0
Cloudflare Zone ID (non-secret; used for DNS automation app setting)
Certificate thumbprints to load into Windows cert store (* = all certs available to the app)
ACS data residency location
Additional tags applied to all resources

When true, Bicep provisions the four Entra app registrations via the Microsoft
Graph extension and uses their output appIds for app settings. This mode is
retained only for backward compatibility; sub-scoped deployments authenticate to
the subscription tenant, so the Graph extension cannot target a separate ExtID
tenant.

When false (default), the *ClientId params below are used directly. CI/CD uses
this mode after the ExtID app registrations are provisioned by Azure CLI.
Short environment identifier — drives uniqueName suffix so dev/staging/prod get separate registrations
Primary public domain for the web app (e.g. woodgrovedemo.com)
Default hostname of the web App Service (used for redirect URIs)
Default hostname of the auth-api App Service (custom auth extension callback host)

oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Access woodgrove-groceries-api as the signed-in user
oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to access woodgrove-groceries-api on behalf of the signed-in user.
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows this app to access woodgrove-groceries-api on your behalf.

appRoles.description: Allows the custom authentication extension to receive payloads from Entra External ID
